title: phlomis × trullenquei subsp. almijarensis
intro: Phlomis × trullenquei subsp. almijarensis is a hybrid plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Jerusalem sage or Spanish sage. It is a perennial plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Phlomis × trullenquei subsp. almijarensis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with medications.
